error: ERROR: Column 'customer_id' not found in source table 'orders_raw'. Schema validation failed.
root_cause: Upstream API renamed 'cust_id' to 'customer_id' without notice.
fix: Updated column mapping in transform step to handle both old and new field names.

error: ERROR: Duplicate primary key detected in 'users' table. 842 rows affected.
root_cause: Source CDC stream sent duplicate insert events after a brief network retry.
fix: Added deduplication step using row_number() window function before merge.

error: ERROR: Upstream dependency 'staging.payments' returned 0 rows. Pipeline halted.
root_cause: Upstream payments job failed silently due to a credential expiry.
fix: Rotated expired service account credentials, added 0-row alert check.

error: ERROR: Column 'customer_id' not found in source table 'orders_raw'. Schema validation failed.
root_cause: Same upstream API reverted the rename temporarily during a rollback.
fix: Reapplied the dual-field mapping fix from INC-001; added schema monitoring alert.

details: Pipeline completed in 4m12s, processed 1.2M rows, no anomalies.

error: ERROR: Query timeout after 1800s on table 'click_events'.
root_cause: Missing partition pruning caused full table scan after a 3x data volume spike.
fix: Added date partition filter and increased cluster size during peak hours.

error: ERROR: Upstream dependency 'staging.payments' returned 0 rows. Pipeline halted.
root_cause: Service account credentials expired again after 30-day rotation policy triggered.
fix: Migrated to long-lived credentials with automated rotation and pre-expiry alerting.

details: Pipeline completed in 2m05s, processed 340K rows, no anomalies.

error: ERROR: Duplicate primary key detected in 'users' table. 12 rows affected.
root_cause: Same CDC duplication pattern as INC-002, retry storm during deploy window.
fix: Reused dedup logic from INC-002; reduced retry storm by adding backoff to CDC connector.

error: ERROR: Null value in non-nullable column 'tracking_status'.
root_cause: Carrier API returned an undocumented null status code for delayed packages.
fix: Added null-coalescing default value 'UNKNOWN' and logged for manual review.

details: Pipeline completed in 3m40s, processed 980K rows, no anomalies.

error: ERROR: Authentication failed (401) calling Meta Ads API.
root_cause: OAuth token expired; refresh job had not run due to a misconfigured cron schedule.
fix: Fixed cron schedule for token refresh job and added expiry alert 24h in advance.

details: Pipeline completed in 5m02s, processed 2.1M rows, no anomalies.

error: ERROR: Encoding error - invalid UTF-8 byte sequence in column 'message_body'.
root_cause: A subset of support tickets contained legacy Latin-1 encoded text from an old system migration.
fix: Added encoding detection and conversion step before loading into the warehouse.

error: ERROR: Query timeout after 1800s on table 'click_events'.
root_cause: Same partition pruning issue as INC-006; a new dashboard query bypassed the date filter.
fix: Enforced partition filter at the view level so all downstream queries inherit it.

details: Pipeline completed in 4m20s, processed 1.3M rows, no anomalies.

error: ERROR: Row count mismatch - expected 5,400 employees, got 5,398.
root_cause: Two contractor records were filtered out by an overly strict employment-type filter.
fix: Updated filter to include 'contractor' employment type explicitly.

error: ERROR: Null value in non-nullable column 'tracking_status'.
root_cause: Same carrier API null-status issue as INC-010, occurring on a different carrier.
fix: Reused null-coalescing fix from INC-010, generalized across all carrier adapters.

details: Pipeline completed in 2m11s, processed 355K rows, no anomalies.

error: ERROR: Rate limit exceeded (429) calling Google Ads API.
root_cause: Pipeline made per-campaign API calls instead of batching, exceeding quota during a campaign launch.
fix: Switched to batched API calls and added exponential backoff on 429 responses.

details: Pipeline completed in 1m50s, processed 410K rows, no anomalies.

error: ERROR: Encoding error - invalid UTF-8 byte sequence in column 'message_body'.
root_cause: Same legacy encoding issue as INC-014, new batch of migrated tickets.
fix: Reused encoding conversion fix from INC-014; flagged source system for full re-migration.

error: ERROR: Column 'customer_id' not found in source table 'orders_raw'. Schema validation failed.
root_cause: Third occurrence - upstream team re-deployed an old API version during a hotfix rollback.
fix: Escalated to upstream team for permanent fix; added contract test to catch this before pipeline run.

details: Pipeline completed in 2m45s, processed 220K rows, no anomalies.
Pipeline completed in 1m30s, processed 5,402 rows, no anomalies.
Pipeline completed in 3m15s, processed 4.8M rows, no anomalies.

error: ERROR: Upstream dependency 'staging.payments' returned 0 rows. Pipeline halted.
root_cause: Third occurrence of the credential expiry issue, despite rotation fix from INC-007.
fix: Discovered rotation script only updated one of two environments; fixed both, added cross-env validation.

error: ERROR: Duplicate primary key detected in 'inventory_items' table. 56 rows affected.
root_cause: Same CDC retry-storm pattern as INC-002/INC-009, now affecting a different table.
fix: Applied the generalized dedup + backoff fix across all CDC-fed tables, not just users.

details: Pipeline completed in 2m02s, processed 88K rows, no anomalies.

error: ERROR: Connection pool exhausted - 'too many clients already' from source database.
root_cause: A new dashboard tool was opening persistent connections to the same database without pooling.
fix: Enforced connection pooling limits and moved dashboard tool to a read replica.
